title: Layout Safety
summary: Measure directory-protocol layout drift and safety issue reporting.

probes.title: Report forbidden payloads, local noise, and unsafe symlinks

issues: installable skill must not ship SKILL_PAYLOAD.json: skills/harness/alpha/SKILL_PAYLOAD.json
installable skill must not contain local noise: skills/harness/alpha/.DS_Store
installable skill symlink target must be relative: skills/harness/alpha/link.txt
